title: GET archived tasks by API
excerpt: I used to get archived items by query: {items_by_column_values(state:archived, board_id: 3692234319, column_id:“check”, column_value:True) {name}}, but it doesn’t work on the new API version. Is there a way to get this a…

posts.author: Marcelo_Passos (Marcelo de Oliveira Passos)
posts.cookedHtml: I used to get archived items by query: {items_by_column_values(state:archived, board_id: 3692234319, column_id:“check”, column_value:True) {name}}, but it doesn’t work on the new API version. Is there a way to get this archived items by new api version?
